---
title: "Site launch!"
date: 2026-06-17
description: "Launching my website to share updates on research, fieldwork, publications, and upcoming events."
categories: [general]
image: "website.png"
image-alt: "Screenshot of the landing page for Jeff Baldock's personal reserach website"
---

Welcome to my website! I'll be using this space to share more information on my research background and interests and to share timely updates including:

- New publications and preprints
- Conference presentations and upcoming talks
- Field season updates and milestones
- Funding announcements and new collaborations
- Student and lab news
